requests.objective: Run the larger practical decoder-style proxy to see whether active-token/KV scale changes nm1 vs nm2 PPA and scheduler pressure.

requested_items.objective: Run larger decoder-style proxy cases to see whether 64 active tokens and 1024-2048 KV-context score widths change nm1 vs nm2 PPA or scheduler pressure.

expected_result.reason: Use the larger practical proxy result to decide whether wider compute-array work is justified or whether precision/quality exploration should remain the frontier.
